query:
-- Sample Telstra services with no revenue assignment — what do they look like?
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.serviceType,
  s.planName,
  s.provider,
  s.billingPlatform,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.provider = 'Telstra' 
  AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue IS NULL OR s.monthlyRevenue = 0)
  AND s.status = 'active'
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
LIMIT 15;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Sample Telstra services with no revenue assignment — what do they look like?
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.serviceType,
  s.planName,
  s.provider,
  s.billingPlatform,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.provider = 'Telstra' 
  AND s.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND (s.monthlyRevenue IS NULL OR s.monthlyRevenue = 0)
  AND s.status = 'active'
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
LIMIT 15;
